CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-27-2011 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(S). APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT(S). CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBARRA, MARTINA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATTERSON, JACKSON K. $495.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $535.00, CLAIM AGAINST SMELLY MEL'S PLUMBING IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT JACKSON PATTERSON, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JUNE 1, 2011, MAKE THE REPAIRS TO PLAINTIFF'S UNIT IN A WORKMAN LIKE MANNER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-10-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-26-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF'S HUSBAND CRISOSTOMO IBARRA PRESENT ON HER BEHALF. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
